signal_name: Referee Foul Environment x Team FTA Dependency
hypothesis: WNBA referee crews with historically elevated foul rates interact with teams structurally dependent on free throws to alter scoring outcomes beyond what team offensive quality alone explains.
mechanism: High foul crews inflate free throw volume. Teams whose scoring profile relies heavily on FTA benefit disproportionately.
crew_threshold: top/bottom quartile among officials with >=20 games
fta_threshold: top quartile of rolling team FTA per game
